query: SELECT ticker, companyName, ytdPerformance, sharpeRatio FROM stocks WHERE companyName LIKE '%Givaudan%' OR companyName LIKE '%Emerson%' OR companyName LIKE '%Pinterest%' OR companyName LIKE '%IBM%' LIMIT 10;
